> Template — seeds stub nodes for architecture decision records and system design patterns.
> Each ## section → one ChromaDB node. Universal scope unless prefixed with platform.

## ADR Format
### Theory
_Stub — standard structure for an Architecture Decision Record: context, decision, consequences._
### Definition
_Stub — required sections: Title, Status, Context, Decision, Consequences, Alternatives Considered._
### Code Pattern
_Stub — ADR markdown template._

## Clean Architecture
### Theory
_Stub — layered architecture: domain → data/presentation; dependency rule enforced._
### Definition
_Stub — layer responsibilities and allowed dependency directions._
### Code Pattern
_Stub — layer diagram._

## SOLID Principles
### Theory
_Stub — Single Responsibility, Open/Closed, Liskov, Interface Segregation, Dependency Inversion._
### Definition
_Stub — one-line rule per principle._
### Code Pattern
_Stub — violation vs compliant example per principle._

### Definition

### Code Pattern
_Stub — canonical API endpoint spec._

_Stub — module naming and ownership rules._

_Stub — canonical flag check._

## Caching Strategy

### Definition
_Stub — cache policy per data type._
### Code Pattern
_Stub — canonical cache read-through pattern._
